title: scanner: spent-note witnesses never pruned from in-memory map
description: scanner.rs:472 — scan_tx updates self.witnesses for every note on every output. When send_payment calls mark_notes_spent, only the DB is updated; self.witnesses retains the entry. Subsequent scan_tx calls continue updating the spent note witness (O(N_spent) extra work per output), and save_block_state serializes and writes all of them every block. The leak is bounded per restart (load_state only loads unspent notes) but grows unboundedly within a long process run. Fix: remove note_id from self.witnesses when the scanner detects a nullifier match, or skip serializing witnesses for spent notes in save_block_state.
